text.title: workflows Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for workflows as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: MLP "update" mode rewrites spec files in-place on retry, clobbering FR numbering.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Always run git status before and after update mode; agents on retry have been observed overwriting FR-NN.N numbering with duplicates. Use the artifact files as checkpoints, not as editable scratch space.

failure-mode.description: Running the full MLP pipeline from cron when the product is still in MVP phase with no telemetry.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: MLP propose generates fictional WOW features when there is no usage data; the cron trigger must check for the existence of a telemetry artifact before running.
